#stitch with @smilinggg:) These Medicube Red Succinic acid pads have helped many with their inflamed acne and cystic acne. 🧪 1. Gentle chemical exfoliation unclogs pores 	•	The pads contain salicylic acid (BHA), a gold-standard acne-fighting ingredient. It penetrates into pores, dissolves dead skin and sebum, and helps prevent clogged pores that lead to breakouts. BHA also has anti-inflammatory properties that can calm angry, puffy blemishes.   ⚖️ 2. Succinic acid helps with acne-related inflammation 	•	Succinic acid is included because it’s shown to help control acne-related bacteria and reduce localized inflammation. It doesn’t exfoliate as strongly as BHAs/AHAs but supports the acne-targeting effect and may help reduce the size/redness of cyst-like spots.   🔥 3. Niacinamide reduces redness and strengthens skin barrier 	•	Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) supports the skin’s barrier function and may reduce redness and irritation that often accompanies inflamed acne and sensitive skin. A stronger barrier can help skin handle irritation better, including mild rosacea flare-ups.   💧 4. Panthenol & soothing ingredients calm irritation 	•	Panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) and other soothing extracts in the formula help replenish moisture and calm irritation after exfoliation. This is important because exfoliating acids can be irritating if left unsupported by calming and hydrating components.   🔄 5. Improving cell turnover helps with texture and scarring 	•	Regular, gentle exfoliation promotes faster skin turnover, which can fade post-acne marks and texture irregularities over time. This doesn’t directly treat rosacea itself but can help visibly refine skin that’s been inflamed.  #acne#acnet#cysticacnea#rosacean#skincare
